understable_driver.baseExplanation: Understable driver flips and glides with the easiest right movement. It creates shape and distance, but is the easiest profile to over-turn.
baseTips: Use smooth release instead of max power.
Add hyzer if the disc is turning too early.

stable_driver.baseExplanation: Stable driver is a balanced distance option. It holds line longer than overstable and is less turn-prone than understable.
baseTips: Use this as the default full-power choice.
Adjust release angle before switching discs.

overstable_driver.baseExplanation: Overstable driver resists turn and finishes left reliably. It is the safest driver profile when conditions are difficult.
baseTips: Aim right if you expect fade.
Use when control matters more than max distance.

understable_mid.baseExplanation: Understable mid offers controllable right movement at moderate speed. It is useful for shaping without full driver power.
baseTips: Keep speed moderate for cleaner landing.

stable_mid.baseExplanation: Stable mid is the neutral control profile. It tracks line cleanly with predictable finish at approach speed.
baseTips: Use when landing zone control matters most.

overstable_mid.baseExplanation: Overstable mid gives dependable fade at controllable speed. It is ideal when you want short-to-mid range reliability.
baseTips: Use less power and trust the fade.

understable_putter.baseExplanation: Understable putter holds glide and gentle right drift at low speed. It helps shape touch lines around the basket.
baseTips: Best for soft turning putts and short approaches.

stable_putter.baseExplanation: Stable putter is the straightest low-speed profile. It gives repeatable line control for putting and short approaches.
baseTips: Default putting profile in neutral conditions.

overstable_putter.baseExplanation: Overstable putter resists turn and keeps a dependable finish. It is the safest putter profile when conditions are moving the disc.
baseTips: Useful for windy putts and short forced fades.
Aim with finish in mind rather than dead center.
